name: musikat-sync
author: madmax1301
description: Triggers musikat (FastAPI backend) on a schedule for automatic discovery + download per Navidrome user. Each configured user gets their own Discovery playlist owned by their Navidrome account, populated from their ListenBrainz top-artists via Deezer artist-radio.

scheduler.reason: Registers a recurring cron job to trigger the musikat discovery pipeline (default: daily 07:00).

kvstore.reason: Persists last-run status (timestamps, counts, last error) per Navidrome user.

subsonicapi.reason: Creates and updates per-user Discovery playlists in Navidrome on behalf of each configured user.

users.reason: Discovery + playlist creation runs in the context of each selected Navidrome user.

taskqueue.reason: One async task per Navidrome user runs the trigger + reconcile pipeline outside the cron callback timeout.

musikat_url.title: musikat URL
musikat_url.description: Base URL of the musikat backend. Example: http://musikat.lan:8000 (no trailing slash).

musikat_token.title: API Token
musikat_token.description: Bearer token from musikat's MUSIKAT_API_TOKEN env var. Leave empty if musikat runs without a token.

cron_expression.title: Cron Expression
cron_expression.description: When to run the sync for all configured users. Default: '0 7 * * *' (daily at 07:00). Use crontab.guru to test custom values.

top_artists.title: Top N Artists (global)
top_artists.description: How many top-played LB artists to sample for discovery. Applies to every configured user.

tracks_per_artist.title: Tracks per Artist (global)
tracks_per_artist.description: Discovery depth per artist (Deezer artist-radio). Applies to every configured user.

max_queue_per_run.title: Max Queue per Run (global, per user)
max_queue_per_run.description: Hard cap on how many tracks can be queued per user per cron run.

users.title: User Mappings
users.description: Each entry maps a Navidrome user to a ListenBrainz account and the name of their Discovery playlist. Use the + button to add additional users. The Discovery playlist is created and owned by the Navidrome user.

navidrome_username.title: Navidrome Username
navidrome_username.description: Must match an existing user that this plugin has access to (see Users Permission).

listenbrainz_username.title: ListenBrainz Username
listenbrainz_username.description: Public LB user whose top-artists drive discovery for this Navidrome user.

playlist_name.title: Playlist Name Template
playlist_name.description: Subsonic playlist name. Placeholder {date} → YYYY-MM-DD, {user} → Navidrome username. Default: 'Discovery {date}'.
